name: The Herds
description: On the journey to the edge of mainland Europe, the animals have scaled the breathtaking Jostedalsbreen Glacier, the largest Glacier in mainland Europe.From rainforest to frozen silence. Forced to flee. Glacier ice melting under hoof.WATCH THE VIDEO

name: The Herds
description: THE HERDS have reached the Arctic Circle, taking their final steps at the cliffs of Nordkapp, one of the northernmost points in the world. They look out across the sea with nowhere left to run...WATCH THE VIDEO

name: The Herds
description: The animals encountered a moment of calm at Olavsfest International Festival, embraced by the ancient traditions of the Sami people. THE HERDS, surrounded by thousands of people, started their final journey north towards the Arctic Circle.WATCH THE VIDEOS

name: The Herds
description: THE HERDS crashed into the pulsing energy of Stockholm city centre. The historical square of Stortorget. The mad rush of animals in a panic. Dust in the air. The animals still searching for safety. They found their way through the alleyways of Gamla Stan, the pictureseque old city. WATCH THE VIDEOS

name: The Herds
description: Cornered between cold water crowds of people, THE HERDS were feeling battered by their long journey. Compressed and coiled tight, something had to give...WATCH THE VIDEOS

name: The Herds
description: Cornered between cold water crowds of people, THE HERDS were feeling battered by their long journey. Compressed and coiled tight, something had to give...WATCH THE VIDEOS

name: The Herds
description: THE HERDS arrived to Scandinavia in the beautiful city of Aarhus.The animals ventured along the Aarhus waterfront and into Aarhus University Campus, where people were invited to come and spend the night camping with the animals. And for the lucky few who were up early, they caught a glimpse of the animals taking a morning drink...WATCH THE VIDEOS

name: The Herds
venue_name: Cathedral Gardens, Exchange Square & Market Street
street_address: Cathedral Gardens, Exchange Square & Market Street
description: The animals were caught up in the opening of the Manchester International Festival in the centre of the city, as the music of Manchester Camerata swirled around them. Later, the stormed through the streets of Heywood, Rochdale and found sanctuary in Pennington Flash Country Park. In partnership with Factory International in association with Rochdale Borough Council, Rochdale Development Agency and Wigan Council.WATCH THE VIDEOS

name: The Herds
description: THE HERDS crossed the River Thames and were welcomed by the children of the city in an early morning encounter created by Unicorn Theatre.Later, they found their way into the heart of London, rampaging through the streets with surprise performances from some of the UK’s most acclaimed artists. Late at night, Londoners were invited to come and find the animals as they hid between the trees in one of London’s most beloved parks. WATCH THE VIDEOS

name: The Herds
description: THE HERDS found themselves in the courtyards of Palais Royal, and ventured on through the city as the madness of Fete de la Music took over. Alarmed, the animals sought refuge in the shade of the Notre Dame.As they ventured north to the outskirts of the city, filth and grace intertwined in a choreography by Samar King exploring the loneliness of people and the desperation of animals.WATCH THE VIDEOS

name: The Herds
description: A choreography co-created by Anthony Matsena weaved its way through the iconic lagoons of Venice. As part of Venice Biennale Danza 2025, under the Artistic Direction of Wayne McGregor.WATCH THE VIDEOS

name: The Herds
venue_name: Quai du Port – Hotel de Ville
street_address: Quai du Port – Hotel de Ville
description: THE HERDS made their way through the picturesque winding streets of Arles, with an alarming presence in the air. An arresting visual aerial acrobatic spectacle unfolded co-created with the acclaimed company Gratte Ciel.Later THE HERDS pushed further north to Marseille, encountering a choreography that explored the impact of devastating floods in our city centres. WATCH THE VIDEOS

name: The Herds
description: THE HERDS made their way through the picturesque winding streets of Arles, with an alarming presence in the air. An arresting visual aerial acrobatic spectacle unfolded co-created with the acclaimed company Gratte Ciel.Later THE HERDS pushed further north to Marseille, encountering a choreography that explored the impact of devastating floods in our city centres. WATCH THE VIDEOS

name: The Herds
description: Arriving to the first big capital of Europe, a feeling of alarm flooded through THE HERDS. They stampeded ferociously through Madrid’s Puerta del Sol. Escaping to the Matadero, the former slaughterhouse, they were corralled by the dancers of Compañía Nacional de Danza.Later, the animals encountered a piece by urban visual artist Suso33, investigating our long fascination with animals and their images, all the way from cave paintings to Picasso and beyond.WATCH THE VIDEOS

name: The Herds
description: The animals burst into beautiful town of San Fernando in southern Spain and took their first confused first steps in Europe. On a street corner they encountered a familiar stomp: the intricate feet of flamenco dancers. As the animals responded with beating hooves, natures rhythm was restored, propelling the herds northwards.WATCH THE VIDEOS

name: The Herds
description: In Casablanca, THE HERDS ran wild through the city centre. They crashed into a performance by circus artist Bader Haoutar, investigating the instinct to climb up away from danger.Eventually, they arrived to the bustling towns of Salé and Rabat, climbed onto boats and started their long to the shores of the Mediterranean.WATCH THE VIDEOS

name: The Herds
venue_name: Fondation Dar Bellarj Maison Des Cigognes
street_address: Fondation Dar Bellarj Maison Des Cigognes
description: Emerging out of the Sahara Desert the animals, covered in dust, arrived to Marrakesh. They meet a group of wailing women, lamenting the severed connection between mankind and nature.Alarmed by the electrifying rhythms, the animals fled into the Kasbeh. Some animals are too big for the intricate maze of alleyways. But they all found a way through.WATCH THE VIDEOS

name: The Herds
description: THE HERDS arrived to the vibrant city of Dakar. Running through the streets of Ouakam they were welcomed with an arresting performance by renowned Senegalese artists collective "Artiste du Daanu". In the center of city - the Medina - they met the artwork of visual artist Fabrice Monteiro in the shape of a stark prophecy, to the sound of Noumoucounda Cissoko's kora. Eventually, THE HERDS found their way to the beach of Golf Sud, where choreographer Jean Tamba responded to the climate crisis throu

name: The Herds
description: The animals crashed into one of the world’s fastest growing metropolis cities. Confused, frightened they made their way through Lagos Island, the floating village of Makoko, Yaba and Ejibo Village. In collaboration with leading Lagos artists Qudus Onikeku, Ochai Ogaba and Jelili Atiku and with A Whitespace Creative Arts Foundation (AWCA).WATCH THE VIDEOS

name: The Herds
description: The world saw the first glimpse of THE HERDS in Kinshasa, DRC. The animals sensed - before us - that something was alarmingly wrong. They emerged from the forest of the Congo Basin started to form along the banks of the mighty Congo River. Lured by electrifying music, they cautiously approached the bustling city. Full of rhythm and danger, THE HERDS began their 20,000km journey.WATCH THE VIDEOS
